creator: Tor.Egge@idt.ntnu.no
text:
simultaneous calls to rename() with the same arguments 
	cause a system crash with the message panic: page fault

How-To-Repeat: 
	Run several instances of this script. 
	---
	#!/bin/sh
	mkdir loser
	while true
	do
	  touch loser/abc
	  mv loser/abc loser/def
	done
	---
